$comment: Routing smoke-test for the RAG layer. Each case is a realistic agent query + the target(s) it should route to. tools/_audit_routing.py scores every book/doc by overlap with the query and PASSES if an expected target lands in the top 3. As you add books, add a case per new topic so routing stays honest. Targets: 'book_NN' or a reference_doc id (lowercase).
pass_rule: expected target in top-3 scored candidates

cases.query: how do I write a new book and number its sections
what is the section id grammar and the deep-dive letter convention
what does this term mean, I need a definition
which architectural decision should I make here, weigh the trade-offs
my system is slow and flaky, what's the diagnosis
common mistakes and failure modes to avoid
what's the milestone build order from zero
recipe for a multi-step task across the books
named technique pattern vocabulary
where is topic Y covered in the books
should a library component use OnPush or rely on zoneless change detection
how do I set up an Angular 22 workspace with a publishable library and a demo app
when do I reach for Angular Material vs Angular Aria vs the CDK for a component
standalone components, signal inputs and dependency injection for a component library
how do I build a custom form control that works with reactive forms
what is ControlValueAccessor and how does a component implement it
when should I use a signal versus an rxjs observable
how do I check a dependency's license and transitive provenance before adding it
is this third-party library's license permissive enough to admit, MIT vs source-available
what is the admit reject gate for a new npm dependency and US-origin rule
how do I share one set of design tokens between Material components and my own built components
how do I implement dark mode and density to match PrimeNG with css custom properties
where do I define color spacing and radius design tokens so components don't hardcode values
how do I position a floating overlay panel against a trigger using the CDK overlay and portal
which CDK utility gives me focus trapping, roving tabindex keyboard navigation, and screen-reader live announcements
how do I virtual scroll a huge list or build a drag-and-drop reorderable list on CDK primitives
what are the Angular Aria headless patterns and how do I use the ngListbox and ngMenu directives
how do I build a headless listbox or select with Angular Aria and style it off the aria-selected attribute with tokens
should I use an Angular Aria headless pattern or hand-wire a raw CDK key manager for this component
how do I make my custom control work inside mat-form-field by implementing MatFormFieldControl with stateChanges and setDescribedByIds
how do I control when validation error messages appear across all my form controls with an ErrorStateMatcher and drive aria-invalid
how do I get PrimeNG FloatLabel IconField and InputGroup parity using mat-form-field float label and prefix suffix addons
how do I build an InputNumber with locale grouping separators and currency formatting using Intl.NumberFormat without a foreign mask library
how do I write an input mask or keyfilter directive that handles paste and IME on beforeinput instead of blocking keydown
how do I build a segmented OTP one-time-code input with paste-spread and roving focus, and a password strength meter
how do I build an OverlayPanel or popover anchored to a trigger with CdkConnectedOverlay that dismisses on Escape and outside-click
how do I make a reusable ConfirmDialog and ConfirmPopup over MatDialog with an alertdialog role and focus restoration
how do I build a CascadeSelect or TreeSelect picker whose overlay options emit node ids as the form value, not the display text
how do I build a context menu, tiered submenu, panel menu, or breadcrumb and pick between MatMenu, the Aria menu, and CDK Menu
how do I build a MatTable with sortable headers, a paginator, sticky columns, and expandable detail rows
my data table freezes with tens of thousands of rows, should I use virtual scroll or a server-side data source or a real data grid
how do I decide grid versus table by row count and write a server-side DataSource that fetches one page per sort and filter change
how do I build a TreeTable with expandable hierarchical rows using MatTable over a cdk tree data source
how do I port accordion card tabs stepper and toolbar from PrimeNG and token-skin the Material versions for density parity
how do I build a splitter, an orderlist, or a picklist with CDK drag-drop that is also operable by keyboard
how do I build an image carousel, a galleria lightbox, and a file upload drop target without a foreign drag library
how do I wrap a third-party library behind a neutral app-owned adapter interface so only one file imports it
how do I enforce adapter isolation and stop adapter erosion with an ESLint no-restricted-imports rule
how do I make a third-party dependency swappable behind an injection token and a provide function
design a neutral interface first for the data grid charts or editor gap and theme the foreign render with tokens
wrap a headless TanStack data grid behind a neutral CaeGridAdapter interface with a single adapter file
build a server-side data grid with grouping, virtual rows, column virtualization and CSV export behind a neutral grid interface
TanStack is headless and renders no DOM so how do I render the grid cells with Material cae tokens
swap a TanStack grid adapter for a MatTable fallback behind the CAE_GRID injection token without changing call sites
build a charts adapter with a neutral CaeChartAdapter interface that renders SVG with cae tokens
why can't I use visx in Angular and should I use d3-scale and d3-shape directly for charts
render-it-yourself data visualization with D3 framework-agnostic modules and a data-table accessibility alternative
size the chart need with a zero-dependency hand-rolled SVG fallback versus the d3 transitive tree
wrap the Lexical rich-text editor behind a neutral CaeEditorAdapter interface so only one adapter file imports it
is Lexical's core framework-agnostic or react-bound, can I use the editor in Angular without React
make a contenteditable rich-text editor a form control implementing ControlValueAccessor exchanging a neutral document value not the editor state
build a rich-text editor with a roving-tabindex formatting toolbar and a plain contenteditable fallback when a full editor engine is overkill
how do I verify a component actually reaches PrimeNG parity for accessibility and not just visually
what is the capability ledger and the implementer versus adversarial verification pass for a component
run axe accessibility checks and prove keyboard operability with the CDK component test harness
write pre-committed parity scenarios and screen-reader testing before a component is marked done
what is the default unit test runner in Angular 22, is it Vitest or Karma and how do I configure it
how do I write a custom CDK ComponentHarness to drive a component in unit and component tests
set up Playwright visual regression snapshots with golden baselines across light and dark themes without flake
how should I structure the test pyramid unit component and integration tests for a component library and wire them into CI
how do I set a bundle size budget in angular.json that fails the build when the initial bundle gets too big
how do I keep my component library tree-shakable with sideEffects false and secondary entry points so importing one component doesn't pull in the rest
how do I lazy load a heavy chart or editor with @defer deferrable views to shrink the initial bundle
how do I profile change detection performance and virtual scroll a data grid with tens of thousands of rows
how do I publish and distribute my angular component library to npm with ng-packagr and the angular package format
how should my library declare @angular peer dependencies and version in lockstep with angular semver and ship ng update migrations
how do I publish with npm provenance and trusted publishing from github actions with sigstore for slsa attestation
how do I ship the us-origin provenance attestation inside the published package alongside the build provenance
how do I migrate my app from PrimeNG to Caelum component by component without a big-bang rewrite
where is the PrimeNG p-* to Caelum cae-* component map or comparison table for the migration
write a schematic codemod to rename p-* selectors and primeng imports to cae-* and caelum entry points
stop new PrimeNG usage during a long migration with an eslint no-restricted-imports ratchet fitness function
